subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of Baha! Thy distinguished ancestor was rare among his contemporaries and a genius of that land and realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه بها جد نامدار نادر روزگار بود و نابغه آن کشور و دیار
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
